/usr/bin/cc -fPIC      -fno-stack-protector  -Xlinker -z -Xlinker now -fPIC -shared -lgcc -Wl,--hash-style=both -Xlinker -T -Xlinker "/home/unina/patch_dynamorio/build/patch_client_libc.ldscript" -shared -Wl,-soname,libpatch_client_libc.so -o libpatch_client_libc.so CMakeFiles/patch_client_libc.dir/client_wisdom_libc.c.o  /home/unina/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/ext/lib64/debug/libdrwrap.so /home/unina/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/ext/lib64/debug/libdrmgr.so /home/unina/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/ext/lib64/debug/libdrcontainers.a /home/unina/DynamoRIO-Linux-11.3.0/lib64/debug/libdynamorio.so
